description: Kubernetes Pod ログの長期 archive 集計 (Garage gold/ parquet を MyDuck 経由で query)。silver 2025-10-18 以降の全期間カバー。shinbunbun/dotfiles-private#263

panels.description: gold/volume をレベル別に集計。 k8s-pods は host (k8s node)、 service (pod / container name) が有意な分析次元、 現状は level のみ stack で全体傾向を見る。 namespace / pod drill-down は将来 variable 化検討余地あり。

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, level AS metric, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY date, level ORDER BY date, level

panels.title: Volume by level (日次)

panels.description: 範囲内で出現量 top-10 の service (pod / container name、 例: pyroscope / garage / postgres) を抽出し、 日次 rate を描画。 NULL service は "(no service)" として表示。 急増 / 急減した container を一目で見るのが主用途。

targets.rawSql: WITH top_services AS (SELECT COALESCE(service, '(no service)') AS svc, sum(count) AS c FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY svc ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT date AS time, COALESCE(service, '(no service)') AS metric, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND COALESCE(service, '(no service)') IN (SELECT svc FROM top_services) GROUP BY date, service ORDER BY date, service

panels.title: Top-10 service by volume (日次)

panels.description: 範囲内で出現量 top-10 の host (k8s node) を抽出し、 日次 rate を描画。 single-node cluster (homemachine のみ) なので現状はほぼ単一 line、 multi-node 化したときに node 別負荷分布が見える。

targets.rawSql: WITH top_hosts AS (SELECT COALESCE(host, '(no host)') AS h, sum(count) AS c FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY h ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT date AS time, COALESCE(host, '(no host)') AS metric, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND COALESCE(host, '(no host)') IN (SELECT h FROM top_hosts) GROUP BY date, host ORDER BY date, host

panels.title: Top-10 host by volume (日次)

panels.description: 範囲内の累計 volume rows。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Total rows (range)

panels.description: 範囲内に観測されている distinct service 数 (pod / container name)。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, count(DISTINCT COALESCE(service, '(no service)'))::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Distinct services (range)

panels.description: 範囲内に観測されている distinct host 数 (k8s node 数)。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, count(DISTINCT host)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=k8s-pods/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Distinct hosts (range)

title: Logs Archive - k8s-pods
